name: Magical Meow Meow Taruto
overview: Magical Meow Meow Taruto is a Japanese magical girl anime series created by Tsukasa Sunaga, and was aired on Wowow and Animax from July 5 to September 20, 2001.

trailers.title: Magical Meow Meow Taruto [魔法少女猫[まじかる にゃん にゃん]たると] Opening Upscaled 1440p | Creditless
